pageSubtitle: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission Developer Playground. Interactive simulation of ABHA Card onboarding, identity lookup, patient consent, and secure cryptographic health information exchange.
abhaAddressHint: This functions as a unified username for accessing and linking patient health records across India.
abhaGeneratedSubtitle: Your new digital identity has been registered on the NHA gateway.
loginSubtitle: Sign in to retrieve your registered digital health card
loginOtpHint: OTP sent to linked mobile. Enter {code} to login.
sandboxGuidelinesBody: This environment mock-verifies authentication flows to match NHA specs.
sandboxGuideline1: Aadhaar OTP is simulated for any 12-digit number (try 882941).
sandboxGuideline2: Registered ABHA Profiles are propagated instantly to the Consent Sandbox.
createConsentSubtitle: Send a request to pull patient diagnostic records
activeRequestsHint: Click to view/interact with request status
dpdpNotice: Authorized details will be sent encrypted. Under DPDP, you have the right to revoke consent at any time.
enterPinHint: Enter secure 4-digit PIN to sign consent (use "1234")
consentGrantedBody: Authorized cryptographic keys have been uploaded to the ABDM gateway.
consentDeniedBody: No health data was exchanged. Access remains restricted.
noActiveRequest: No active consent request. Create one on the left panel to test.
cryptoPipelineSubtitle: Simulate HIPAA/DISHA data push from lab to hospital
logHipEncrypts: HIP loads FHIR bundle & encrypts payload
logHiuDecrypts: HIU decrypts data using Private Key
dishaFrameworkBody: Encryption safeguards clinical data at-rest and in-transit.
payloadViewerSubtitle: Live view of network payload during transmission
recordsImported: Decrypted Records successfully imported into HIMS
prescriptionDosage: Once daily in the morning for 30 days
toastInvalidMobile: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number
toastInvalidMobileOtp: Invalid OTP. Try 483910 for the sandbox simulator.
toastInvalidAadhaar: Please enter a valid 12-digit Aadhaar number
toastInvalidAadhaarOtp: Invalid OTP. Try 882941 for the sandbox simulator.
toastEnterAbhaPrefix: Please enter an ABHA Address prefix
toastEnterLoginId: Please enter your Mobile number or ABHA Address
toastInvalidLoginOtp: Invalid OTP. Try 554321 for the sandbox simulator.
toastSelectDataType: Select at least one health data type
toastEnterPin: Please enter verification PIN on the simulator device.
toastIncorrectPin: Incorrect PIN. Please enter '1234' to authorize.
toastDecryptionComplete: Decryption complete! Health records successfully linked to patient profile.
